Class MusicBand

java.lang.Object
common.dataclasses.MusicBand
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<MusicBand>
public class MusicBand extends Object implements Comparable<MusicBand>
Represents a music band entity with various attributes such as name, coordinates, creation date, number of participants, albums count, music genre, and label. Implements Comparable to allow ordering based on albums count, label bands, and participants count.

  • Constructor Details

    • MusicBand

      public MusicBand()
      Default constructor for MusicBand.

    • MusicBand

      public MusicBand(Integer id, String name, Coordinates coordinates, ZonedDateTime creationDate, long numberOfParticipants, long albumsCount, MusicGenre genre, Label label)
      Constructs a MusicBand with all required fields, performing validation checks.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier, must be positive and not null
      name - the band name, must not be null or empty
      coordinates - the coordinates, must not be null
      creationDate - the creation date, must not be null
      numberOfParticipants - the number of participants, must not be negative
      albumsCount - the number of albums, must not be negative
      genre - the music genre, may be null
      label - the label, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any validation constraint is violated

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the MusicBand object with color formatting.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a colored string containing all band attributes

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(MusicBand o)
      Compares this MusicBand with another MusicBand. Ordering is determined first by albums count, then by label bands count, and finally by number of participants.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<MusicBand>
      Parameters:
      o - the other MusicBand to compare to
      Returns:
      a negative integer, zero, or a positive integer as this band is less than, equal to, or greater than the specified band
